title: Faithful 64x - Alternative Environment
description: An add-on for Faithful 64x that adds textures variations to blocks and entitites!
body:
![](https://imgur.com/snhMiuC.png)
<center> Add variety to your world by introducing randomised textures for many blocks!

![](https://media.discordapp.net/attachments/813787223190405212/1187099482991628319/jngjgjgjgjgjgj.png?ex=6595a78b&is=6583328b&hm=a3a97f613575166191b6fbc6cbfaf12c473a9ad3cc272481a1827040584b066f&=&format=webp&quality=lossless&width=1191&height=670.png)
